text.tspan: Median Physics ms/frame; lower is better.
Headless, no-graphics run; Windows x64 release files; 10 repeats; threads 16; 300 measured steps + 30 warmup; 60 Hz.
Micro-Star International Co., Ltd. PRO Z790-A WIFI (MS-7E07) BIOS A.E0; Microsoft Windows 11 Pro for Workstations 64-bit 10.0.26200
Rust 1.95 Cargo release; Avian3D 0.8.0-dev; Bevy 0.19.0; features 3d,f32,parry-f32,parallel,simd.
